title: Step 4: Click  and follow your browser prompts to download the file.

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To download your Online Archive query logs, you must have
[Project Data Access Read Only](<Project Data Access Read Only>) access or higher to the project.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
To download query logs:

You can chose one of these:

- Online Archive Only to download logs for queries
  against your Online Archive only

- Cluster and Online Archive to download logs for queries
  against both the Atlas cluster and Online Archive

You can chose one of these:

- Last 4 Hours

- Last 8 Hours

- Last 12 Hours

- Last 24 Hours

- Custom Date

The downloaded log filename varies based on the Source
for which you are downloading the logs:

Online Archive Only

Cluster and Online Archive
